title: Progressive Disclosure Toolbar for Metrics Glossary
story: As a DataTools Pro user managing metrics, I want the toolbar to show only the essentials by default and progressively reveal more features as I enable them, so that the interface is clean and I am not overwhelmed by options.
description:
User feedback consistently says the Metrics page is confusing. Implement progressive disclosure: start with a minimal toolbar and reveal more controls as the user activates them.

## Default State (all icons deselected)
- Search bar visible
- Filter icon, Group By icon, and Multi-row icon visible as toggle buttons
- No filter dropdowns, group by dropdowns, or multi-row buttons shown

## Progressive Activation
- **Filter icon toggled**: Shows filter dropdowns in a horizontal layout
- **Group By icon toggled**: Shows group by dropdown to the left of filters
- **Multi-row icon toggled**: Shows bulk action buttons after the other controls

## Additional Changes
- Custom SVG icons for Filter and Group By (replacing previous icons) for full styling control
- Collapse redundant nested DIVs for consistent page alignment
- Category dropdowns default to "All"
acceptance_criteria: Toolbar shows only search and toggle icons in default state
Clicking filter icon reveals filter dropdowns horizontally
Clicking group by icon reveals group by dropdown
Clicking multi-row icon reveals bulk action buttons
Custom SVG icons used for filter and group by
Redundant DIVs collapsed for consistent alignment
Layout matches other pages in the application
ux_changes: Progressive disclosure toolbar on Metrics Glossary: toolbar features hidden by default and revealed via toggle icons. Custom SVG icons for filter and group by. Clean default state addresses user confusion feedback.
implementation_notes: Toggle icons show/hide corresponding toolbar sections. Custom SVG icons provide full control over active/inactive styling. Product owner provided SVG files for filter and group by. Redundant DIVs collapsed. Developer asked about the SVG reference and implemented custom icons.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the progressive disclosure layout and shared screenshots. Asked for clarification on custom SVG icons — product owner had attached SVGs for filter and group by. Updated icons and pushed for review.
